items.caption: A product packaging for a "boutique silk pillow" by the fine bedding company. the packaging is predominantly white with a black and blue label featuring a photograph of a person lying on a bed with a luxurious pillow. the label also includes text that describes the pillow as "smartfil synthetic" and highlights its features such as being "smartfil and sumptuous silk blend filling" and suitable for "the luxury hotel experience you love." the packaging has a tag attached to it with the company's name and a barcode. the pillow is displayed in the foreground against a white background.
A decorative hand-painted silk throw pillow featuring a vibrant floral pattern with red and white flowers on a green background.
an unmade bed with tangled silk and cotton sheets.
